# ToolUiMeta.ResourceUri property

REQUIRED. A URI in the `ui://` scheme identifying the UI resource to render for this tool; the host obtains it by issuing `resources/read` for this exact URI (§26.3, §26.4, §17).

```csharp
public string ResourceUri { get; set; }
```
